introSection: Mega-Lite is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China. Built by Intamin, it is the fourth Mega-Lite roller coaster and the second of two Mega-Lite roller coasters to be built in the Happy Valley chain.
fullText: Mega-Lite is a steel roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China. Built by Intamin, it is the fourth Mega-Lite roller coaster and the second of two Mega-Lite roller coasters to be built in the Happy Valley chain.
